first_run.rationale: The scores and core justifications are identical. The strengths are rephrased but substantively the same. The only notable difference is the third concern, which shifts from a lack of Windows experience to a lack of specific SQL database experience (SQL Server, Oracle). This is a minor change in focus on a plausible missing skill and is best explained as ordinary run-to-run noise rather than a biased reaction to the university change.
